name: Guadalupe Bank
description_short: FDIC-insured community bank serving Kerrville and Fredericksburg, Texas with checking, savings, mortgages, and personal loans through online and mobile platforms.
description_long: Guadalupe Bank is a community-focused financial institution operating in the Kerrville and Fredericksburg areas of Texas. The bank emphasizes local presence and personalized service while maintaining federal deposit insurance protections through FDIC backing. The institution offers comprehensive banking services across both personal and business segments. Personal banking includes checking accounts, savings and money market accounts, certificates of deposit (CDs), and various loan products including home mortgages, home equity loans, construction loans, refinance loans, and personal loans. Business customers can access business checking, savings accounts, and loans or lines of credit. Digital banking is available through online and mobile platforms, including Zelle integration for peer-to-peer transfers. Guadalupe Bank distinguishes itself as a community bank with physical branch locations in two towns, offering face-to-face service alongside modern digital banking options. The bank maintains a 24/7 telephone banking line and provides online account access. The institution has been proactive about security awareness, publicly warning customers about fraud attempts and spoofing schemes. The bank serves both retail and small business customers in a limited geographic market. While specific rates, fees, and loan terms are not detailed on the publicly available website content, the institution provides standard banking services typical of community banks. Limited information is available about competitive advantages in pricing or specialized lending programs beyond what community banks typically offer.
services: Business savings and money market accounts
Business loans and lines of credit
Mobile banking app with mobile deposits and bill pay
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by full faith and credit of U.S. Government
24/7 telephone banking and online access for account management
Mobile app with mobile deposit, balance checking, transfers, and bill payment capabilities
Comprehensive loan products including mortgages, home equity loans, construction loans, and personal loans
Zelle integration for peer-to-peer money transfers
Physical branch locations in Kerrville and Fredericksburg for in-person service
Active fraud monitoring and customer security alerts
cons: Limited to two geographic locations (Kerrville and Fredericksburg, Texas), restricting access for customers outside these areas
Website lacks detailed information on interest rates, fees, minimum deposits, or loan terms for comparison shopping
No mention of specialized products like investment services, wealth management, or business credit card offerings
Limited information about customer support hours or service capabilities beyond basic banking
No details provided about competitive advantages in rates or fees versus other community or national banks
best_for: Local residents of Kerrville and Fredericksburg, Texas seeking community bank relationships
Small business owners in the service area needing business checking and lending
Customers prioritizing in-person banking with branch access plus digital convenience
Depositors seeking FDIC insurance protection with a locally-rooted institution
diagnosis: Guadalupe Bank is best for individuals and small business owners in the Kerrville and Fredericksburg, Texas area seeking traditional community banking with FDIC protection, physical branch access, and modern digital services. The main caveat is geographic limitation—this bank only serves its two Texas locations, making it inaccessible for customers outside the service area or those preferring statewide or national banking options.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: FDIC-insured community bank serving Kerrville and Fredericksburg, Texas with checking, savings, mortgages, and personal loans.
